completed_tasks.name: Frontend UI: auto-fill toggle, inference badge, rescore toast
Wire auto-fill into sync pipeline + scoring reset
Fix frame extraction: BytesIO→tempfile, remove bad -frames:v flag
Wire OPENAI_API_KEY into docker-compose.yml backend env block
Locale normalization en→en_US, smarter vision prompt, DB migration
Key frame extraction: ~20 frames across full video for vision

remaining_tasks.name: Verify UAT #2: inference status badge (needs assets synced with OPENAI_API_KEY active)
Consider removing/restricting debug autofill endpoint before production

human_actions_pending.action: Verify UAT #2 inference status badge after next full sync run
human_actions_pending.context: No auto-filled assets existed at UAT time. OPENAI_API_KEY now wired. Next sync will populate ai_inference_tracking rows.

decisions.decision: Use imageio_ffmpeg not OpenCV for frame extraction
decisions.rationale: OpenCV not installed; imageio_ffmpeg already present and working

decisions.decision: Sample ~20 evenly-spaced key frames across full video
decisions.rationale: Single first-frame was misleading for ads with English intro + non-English body

decisions.decision: All language values normalized to BCP 47 locale codes (en_US, id_ID)
decisions.rationale: BrainSuite API expects locale format; migrated existing ISO 639-1 DB values

decisions.decision: debug autofill endpoint uses get_current_user not get_current_admin
decisions.rationale: Convenience for testing; should be restricted before production

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 10 to plan in-app-notifications phase. Before shipping, restrict or remove the debug autofill endpoint.
context_notes: Phase 09 fully complete and verified (3/3 plans, 2/3 UAT items confirmed). Post-phase session fixed 3 bugs in the autofill pipeline: ffmpeg frame extraction, missing OPENAI_API_KEY env injection, and single-frame vision replaced with multi-frame key-frame sampling. Language values now consistently use BCP 47 locale codes (en_US, id_ID). Pipeline tested and working on real DV360 assets.
